queries.question: List the chefs and also list the servers who speak English.
queries.sql:
SELECT Chefs.lastname
FROM Languages JOIN Chefs ON Languages.LanguageID = Chefs.LanguageID
UNION
SELECT Servers.lastname
FROM Languages JOIN Servers ON Languages.LanguageID = Servers.LanguageID
WHERE Languages.LanguageName = "English"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?languages a :Languages .
    ?chefs a :Chefs .
    ?chefs p:hasLanguages ?languages .
    ?chefs p:LastName ?lastname .
    BIND(?lastname AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?languages a :Languages .
    ?servers a :Servers .
    ?servers p:hasLanguages ?languages .
    ?servers p:LastName ?lastname .
    ?languages p:LanguageName ?languagename_f .
    FILTER(STR(?languagename_f) = "English")
    BIND(?lastname AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Show the chefs and servers who speak English.
queries.sql:
SELECT Chefs.lastname
FROM Languages JOIN Chefs ON Languages.LanguageID = Chefs.LanguageID
WHERE Languages.LanguageName = "English"
UNION
SELECT Servers.lastname
FROM Languages JOIN Servers ON Languages.LanguageID = Servers.LanguageID
WHERE Languages.LanguageName = "English"
